name: cpa-quota
description: CLI 监控远程 CPA 配额与账号状态

scripts.build: tsup src/cli.tsx --format esm --out-dir dist --target node18 --clean && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='dist/cli.js';const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!')) fs.writeFileSync(p,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c);fs.chmodSync(p,0o755);"
